rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL Y. HO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the proposed distribution is unnecessarily cumbersome. Cash is cash and it does not matter in which account cash is held and the number of shares of securities, not their market value, is what gets distributed. Statutory fees may not be rounded up. Counsel is also directed to read CRC 2.110(a) regarding the formatting of pleadings.
